name: Category
description: Embedded storefront category listing — renders products from a chosen category with filters, sorting and view-mode controls inside a content page. Use when: the user wants a full category/product-browsing experience embedded on a non-category page (e.g. a 'Shop our printers' landing block). Skip when: a simple curated product grid is enough (use `products` or `favorite-products`), specific SKUs only (use `predefined-product-list`), carousel format (use `products-carousel`), or this IS the storefront's own category page (rendered by the storefront, not by a content page). `categoryId` selects the source category by id; `keyword` filters by free text. `viewMode` (`grid` / `list` / `<unset>` to inherit storefront default), `cardType` (`full` / `short`), and `columnsAmountTablet` / `columnsAmountDesktop` shape the grid. `hideSidebar` / `hideControls` / `hideSorting` / `hideBreadcrumbs` strip storefront chrome — leave at defaults unless the user wants a stripped-down embed. `filtersOrientation` is vertical by default; horizontal renders filters as a top bar. `filtersDisplayOrder.order` is a comma-separated list overriding default filter order; `showRest` controls whether non-listed filters still appear after the listed ones. `countLimitation` + `fixedProductsCount` (max 20) cap the result count. `allowSetMeta` lets the embedded category override page SEO meta — keep false unless intended. `showButtonToDefaultView` adds an escape hatch to the storefront's default category page (only useful when this page's URL overlaps a real category URL).

element.label: Filters order
element.info: Order of the filters - comma-separated string of any case. Leave empty to show all filters in default order. Example: "price, brand, category".

element.label: Show rest of filters
element.info: Show the rest of the filters.

settings.label: Card type
settings.info: Card type for grid view mode

settings.label: Count limitation
settings.info: Turn on to set up products count limitation

settings.label: Hide total products count
settings.info: Hidden if Count Limitation is active

settings.label: Allow set metadata
settings.info: Allow the component to set SEO meta tags based on fetched category

settings.label: Show button to default category view
settings.info: Toggle this switch to add a button that, when clicked, shows the default category view. Applicable for pages with an URL overlapping the existing category page URL (e.g., /printers).
